name: KorYor11_Origin
query:
select 
S.patient as 'customer',
CHAR_LENGTH(S.patient),
S.Creation as 'creation_date',
I.generic_name as 'generic_name', 
I.item_name as 'item_name', 
(SI.actual_qty - SI.qty)  as 'actual_qty',
SI.qty as 'qty',
SI.stock_uom as 'uom',
I.default_supplier as 'supplier'
from `tabSales Invoice` S
JOIN `tabSales Invoice Item` SI
ON S.name = SI.parent
JOIN `tabItem` I 
ON SI.item_name = I.name
WHERE I.is_khoryor=1
AND S.creation between %(from_date)s and %(to_date)s
ORDER BY I.item_name, S.Creation
